回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	113學年度第1學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 英文(一) (English(I))	開課班級 : 日大學英文	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 戚常卉	必選修 : 必修	 	 


1.教學目標
Students can readily appreciate the significant themes and diverse cultures presented in the textbook. This will enable them to acquire essential critical reading and thinking skills, fostering a deeper understanding and multifaceted perceptions of the world's multiculturalism. The primary objective is to enhance students' reading comprehension and vocabulary skills, promote critical thinking, and facilitate cross-cultural communication.
